Rui_ro: Gateway khong cap nhat firmware dinh ky
Bien_phap_giam_thieu: Thiet lap lich cap nhat firmware dinh ky; dang ky nhan canh bao bao mat (security advisory) tu nha san xuat; kiem thu firmware truoc khi trien khai.

Rui_ro: Tai khoan quan tri dung mat khau yeu, khong co MFA
Bien_phap_giam_thieu: Ap dung chinh sach mat khau manh, bat buoc xac thuc da yeu to (MFA); khoa tai khoan sau nhieu lan dang nhap sai.

Rui_ro: Camera IP su dung mat khau mac dinh
Bien_phap_giam_thieu: Bat buoc doi mat khau mac dinh khi cai dat; vo hieu hoa tai khoan mac dinh; dat thiet bi trong VLAN rieng.

Rui_ro: Firmware thiet bi loi thoi chua CVE da cong bo
Bien_phap_giam_thieu: Thay the thiet bi khong con duoc ho tro; quet lo hong dinh ky; va loi ngay khi co ban cap nhat.

Rui_ro: Truy cap tu xa khong gioi han vao he thong quan ly
Bien_phap_giam_thieu: Gioi han truy cap tu xa qua VPN; ap dung whitelist dia chi IP; bat MFA cho tai khoan quan tri tu xa; ghi log va canh bao khi co dang nhap tu xa bat thuong.
